title: schismatoglottis havilandii
intro: Schismatoglottis havilandii is a species of flowering plant in the family Arum, native to Borneo. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its rhizome, which is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Schismatoglottis havilandii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Schismatoglottis havilandii is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
